title: phragmites nigricans
intro: Phragmites nigricans, also known as black needle rush, is a type of perennial wetland grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Phragmites nigricans is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts have been used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
